notes: No new evidence extracted. The only paper in the corpus that explicitly mentions trilaminar cells (CID 4934764, Jinno et al. 2007) resolves to PMID:27997999, which is already in existing refs. All other summaries in the corpus concern different interneuron types (OLM, bistratified, IS, Ivy/NGC, CCK basket, hippocampo-septal, etc.) and contain no verbatim quotes about trilaminar cells, M2R/muscarinic M2 receptor expression in PV+ interneurons, or the trilaminar axon pattern spanning str. oriens/pyramidale/radiatum.
